message:
fix(scheduler): cap work-stealing batch size and probe depth in local queue

Add safety bounds to the Stealer to prevent pathological behavior with
very large queues:

- Cap steal_limit at 256 tasks (previously unbounded half of queue
  length) to avoid monopolizing the destination queue or holding locks
  too long processing an oversized batch
- Cap remaining_attempts at 1024 (previously equal to initial_len) to
  prevent O(N) stalls when the queue is filled with thousands of
  local-affinity tasks that cannot be stolen

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
